depression.description: I often feel like I'm stuck in these relationships where I give so much but receive very little in return. It's exhausting and makes me feel powerless.

depression.topic: Loneliness despite being in a relationship
depression.description: Even when I'm with Cleo, I feel incredibly lonely. It’s like I’m just a support system for her, and my own needs are completely ignored.
I get really frustrated when I realize that I’m being manipulated emotionally. It makes me question my worth and why I keep allowing it to happen.
I can't shake the feeling that I'm unlovable. No matter how much I try to connect with others, I always end up feeling abandoned and alone.

Delusion.topic: Fear of being used in relationships
Delusion.description: I constantly worry that people, like Cleo, are just using me for their emotional needs. It makes me feel like I'm just a tool for their convenience.
I believe that in order to receive love, I have to put others' needs above my own. It feels like a never-ending cycle of giving without getting anything back.

Delusion.topic: Jealousy and insecurity in romantic situations
Delusion.description: When I see Cleo texting another guy, I feel this intense jealousy and insecurity. It reinforces my belief that I will always be discarded like everyone else.
